title: New Data Sync Job
subtitle: Configure the source endpoint, environment, and retry policy

form.name: Job name
form.namePlaceholder: Enter a job name beginning with a letter
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the data source, schedule, and failure handling

validation.nameLength: The job name must contain 4 to 24 characters
validation.namePattern: The job name must begin with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens
validation.endpointInvalid: The service endpoint must be a valid HTTPS URL
validation.descriptionLength: The job description cannot exceed 120 characters

confirmation.title: Confirm Sync Job Creation
confirmation.message: The job will connect to the source endpoint and begin syncing immediately. Continue?

feedback.requestFailed: Unable to create the job. Review the form and try again
feedback.quotaExceeded: This workspace has insufficient quota. Contact an administrator to increase it
